auth.name: Name
auth.accountKindHint: Doesn't limit your roles — search, hire and offer expertise alike. Activate any role later from your account.
auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back! Sign in to continue your career journey
auth.registerSubtitle: Start your smart career journey today

roleSwitcher.requestTitle: Add a role to your account
roleSwitcher.requestHint: One profile, multiple roles — switch anytime.
roleSwitcher.seekerDesc: Find opportunities, apply, and build your resume and trust.
roleSwitcher.interviewerDesc: Evaluate candidates for a fee — the Certified badge boosts your ranking.
roleSwitcher.companyDesc: Post opportunities, receive applications, and hire top talent.
roleSwitcher.endorserDesc: Endorse colleagues and vouch for skills you witnessed firsthand.
roleSwitcher.coachDesc: Long-term career coaching: paths, resumes and soft skills.
roleSwitcher.trainerDesc: Intensive courses and workshops closing assessment gaps.
roleSwitcher.consultantDesc: Strategic consulting for companies on market and team design.
roleSwitcher.pendingNote: Your request is under review — the role activates on approval.
roleSwitcher.extraRolesHint: You can activate more roles now or later from your account menu.

dashboard.aiGreeting: You have {opportunities} new matching opportunities, {wishes} incoming wishes, and {endorsements} received endorsements.

discovery.noResultsHint: Try widening the filters or adjusting your search

opportunities.title: Browse opportunities
opportunities.subtitle: AI-recommended opportunities based on your profile
opportunities.search: Search by title, company, or skill…
opportunities.topBanner: Best match for your profile: “{title}” — {company} · {rate}% match

requests.title: Requests marketplace
requests.subtitle: Jobs, projects, consultations and tasks — smartly ranked by your match
requests.search: Search: Vue projects, architecture consulting, short task…
requests.topBanner: Recommended for you: “{title}” from {org} — {rate}% match with your profile.

interviewers.title: Certified interviewers marketplace
interviewers.subtitle: Certified experts run documented assessment interviews that boost your confidence score
interviewers.search: Search interviewers by name or specialty…
interviewers.tiersModalDesc: Interviewers are promoted automatically between tiers as their completed interviews and ratings grow.
interviewers.reschedIntro: The AI suggested alternative times based on your preferences and the interviewer's availability — pick one:
interviewers.reschedDone: Interview rescheduled — the new time was sent to the interviewer for confirmation.

experts.title: Experts marketplace
experts.subtitle: Discover certified mentors, trainers and consultants and request their service directly
experts.joinBanner: Have mentoring, training or consulting experience? Join the marketplace and turn your expertise into income.
experts.describeGoal: Describe your goal for the service
experts.describeGoalPlaceholder: Example: I want a transition plan from IT support to front-end development within 6 months
experts.requestHelp: Your request reaches the expert via “Peer requests” and you follow their reply there.
experts.requestSent: Your request was sent — follow up in peer requests.
experts.notifTitle: Your request was sent to the expert
experts.notifBody: {service} from {name} — follow the reply in peer requests.

people.title: Explore people
people.subtitle: Meet the platform's community — experts, seekers and organizations, each with a verified public page
people.search: Search by name, specialty, or skill…
people.ctaBanner: These are their pages — where's yours? Strengthen and share it so opportunities find you here.
people.demoNote: Demo profile for display — full member pages activate with the backend connection.

portal.title: Discover
portal.subtitle: Search and explore across all markets together — opportunities, requests, people, experts and interviewers.
portal.search: Search the whole platform: title, person, company, skill…
portal.noResultsFor: No results for “{query}”. Try different keywords.
portal.startHint: Type in the search bar above to start.
